purpose: Define safe source and review requirements for future mantra selection without enabling public dynamic mantra output.

approved_source_categories.label: Reviewed Sanskrit reference
approved_source_categories.use_case: Manual verification of mantra text, spelling, deity association and usage context.

approved_source_categories.label: Recognized devotional compilation
approved_source_categories.use_case: Cross-checking commonly used mantras before display.

approved_source_categories.label: Editorial Sanskrit review
approved_source_categories.use_case: Final review of Devanagari, transliteration and meaning before public use.

approved_source_categories.label: Tradition context note
approved_source_categories.use_case: Contextual explanation where a mantra is associated with a deity, day, practice, or observance.

blocked_source_categories: runtime DOM generation of mantra text
guardrails: Do not generate new mantras automatically.
Do not enable public dynamic mantra output.
Do not present mantra as guaranteed remedy.
Do not fetch external mantra APIs in this stage.
All Sanskrit text, transliteration, deity association and meaning must be reviewed before public use.
